Run Free AI on Nvidia B300: Kim K 2.5 & Olama Setup Guide

Olama has upgraded their free cloud to run on Nvidia's latest B300 chips, enabling high-performance models like Kim K 2.5 and GLM 5. Learn how to use these powerful AI models with web search for free by integrating them into OpenClaw and Claw Code.

00:00 - Intro: Nvidia B300 Update
01:29 - What is Olama Cloud?
01:57 - One Command Setup: Kim K 2.5
02:28 - Connecting to OpenClaw & Claw Code
03:28 - Running GLM 5 for Free
05:25 - Managing Cloud Usage Limits
06:50 - Why Kim K 2.5 is a Game Changer
08:14 - AI Automation Training & Community

chapters.title: Why Kim K 2.5 is a Game Changer
